[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000100 2
1 111100001 5
2 011110000 4
3 101111110 7
4 011011111 7
5 011000101 4
6 111110011 7
7 101111111 8

12 21 011000101 4 match 5
23 32 011000001 3
34 43 000000011 2
45 54 000000100 1
56 65 100000000 1
67 76 011100000 3
70 07 001110000 3

02 20 001000100 2
13 31 011010011 5
24 42 000000101 2
35 53 100000000 1
46 64 000000001 1
57 75 000000000 a
60 06 101100000 3
71 17 011010000 3

14 41 000001111 4
25 52 000000100 1
36 63 111100001 5 match 1
47 74 000000000 a
50 05 100000100 2 match 0
61 16 011000001 3
72 27 011000000 2

04 40 000001110 3
15 51 000000100 1
26 62 011000001 3
37 73 011110000 4 match 2
